description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This fragrance initiates feminine moods. Product Details Rasasi Emotions is a perfume spray for women with a citrusy, fresh and fruity fragrance. Top notes are lemon, mandarin, bergamot orange and Tamarine. The middle notes are Kiwi, pineapple, cassis, freesia, water lily and jasmine. The base notes are sandalwood, amber, musk, cedar and vanilla. The perfume comes in a regal and elegant bottle designed for understated beauty. Size 50 ml
